name: Ada Whitfield
note: Fictional sample data for offline tests and demos. Not a real person.

articles.title: International Mathematical Olympiad 2014 — Individual Results
articles.snippet: Ada Whitfield (United Kingdom) was awarded a Gold Medal at the 55th International Mathematical Olympiad, placing 11th overall out of 560 contestants.

articles.title: Consensus Under Partial Synchrony in Geo-Replicated Stores
articles.snippet: Authors: A. Whitfield, R. Nakamura. We present a consensus protocol reducing cross-region commit latency by 38%. The paper has been cited 240 times since publication.

articles.title: Rivulet raises $4M seed to rebuild database replication
articles.snippet: Rivulet, founded by former Stripe engineer Ada Whitfield, has raised a $4M seed round led by Accel with participation from Y Combinator. The company graduated from the YC W21 batch.

articles.title: The European deep-tech founders investors are watching
articles.snippet: Among them is Ada Whitfield, whose infrastructure startup Rivulet has become a quiet favourite among database engineers. Whitfield previously spent four years at Stripe.

articles.title: Scalable replication for scientific data pipelines
articles.snippet: Whitfield, A. et al. describe a replication layer adopted by three national research computing centres.

articles.title: Forbes 30 Under 30 Europe — Technology
articles.snippet: Ada Whitfield, 28, founder of Rivulet, is recognised for work on distributed database infrastructure used by more than 400 companies.

articles.title: Why we rewrote our replication layer from scratch
articles.snippet: A technical write-up by Rivulet founder Ada Whitfield on the company engineering blog.

articles.title: Ada Whitfield — Founder & CEO at Rivulet
articles.snippet: Founder & CEO at Rivulet. Previously Senior Engineer at Stripe. MEng Computer Science, University of Cambridge.
